positive: A stylized, highly detailed arrangement of luminous celestial elements intertwined with exotic bioluminescent flora. The composition should be a centralized, symmetrical mandala design, featuring intertwining moon phases, crescent nebula wisps, and stylized star-pollinated night flowers. Use a monochromatic palette of deep indigo, sapphire blue, gold leaf accents, and matte black. The art style should mimic elegant, modern etching or engraved linocut, emphasizing clean silhouettes, strong contrast, and geometric perfection. Perfect for a vintage-inspired apparel print, ensuring all lines are crisp and scalable. Full body view, overhead composition, highly detailed pattern work, mystical, serene, cosmic botanical.
negative: blurry, fuzzy, noisy, artifact, watermark, signature, logo, text, illegible characters, low detail, grain, excessive saturation, bad anatomy, extra limbs, cropped, amateur, photorealistic, 3d render
